title: retama raetam subsp. bovei
intro: Retama raetam subsp. bovei, also known as the 'Tree of Life', is a shrub or small tree species native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Retama raetam subsp. bovei include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and antibacterial activities. Traditional herbal preparations include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, digestive problems, and skin conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
